events.name: Women Founder & VC Meetup
events.description: Curated $20 evening at Hustle Fund with dinner, panel, and networking for women founders and VC investors. Women-in-AI-adjacent founder/investor room — doubles as VC/new-media discovery.

events.name: B2B — AI Founders & Investors Meetup
events.description: Free NYC B2B community meetup pairing B2B AI founders with investors — exactly the founder-and-investor night the VC/New Media hypothesis targets. Venue TBA.

events.name: Investors Breakfast — GTM In The Age Of AI
events.description: Curated $20 breakfast on transforming sales and marketing with AI, with speakers from Zentra Ventures, Cisco, and enterprise GTM. Founders, operators, investors, and GTM leaders in one room — direct hit on the VC/new-media discovery play.

events.name: AI Summit @ Stanford (Startup Universe)
events.venue: Stanford Campus, 450 Jane Stanford Way, Stanford
events.description: Three-day $299 summit pitched at investors writing big checks, founders, and frontier researchers. Investor-dense room aligned with the VC/new-media hypothesis.

events.name: B2B AI Founder/VC Dinner
events.description: Curated $20 dinner with limited seats bringing B2B AI founders, VCs, and operators together — panel plus VIP meet-and-greet. High-fit salon-style investor room for the VC/new-media discovery question.

events.name: AI Founders Supper Club
events.description: Curated supper club for AI founders — small salon-format dinner, high trust-per-minute room for ICP-1 and investor-adjacent conversations.

events.name: Founder-Led Growth — The Content System That Brings Customers
events.description: Free workshop on building a founder-led content system that converts customers — directly on Eve's executive-voice thesis; audience is founders doing their own thought leadership (ICP-1/2 signal). Venue TBA.

events.name: Women In AI Breakfast
events.description: Free breakfast panel with women AI leaders from You.com, Cisco, Netflix, and Stanford, plus structured networking and an investor meet-and-greet. Women-in-AI community room with founder/investor overlap.

events.name: Step San Francisco 2026
events.venue: The Midway (Day 2); Day 1 kick-off events across SF
events.description: Two-day startup and tech conference for the people building the AI economy — operators, founders, and investors across four tracks; past speakers from a16z, Khosla Ventures, Replit, Brex. Strong founder/investor tentpole with side-activation potential.

events.name: AITX Community Monthly Meetup
events.description: Long-running monthly AI meetup (demos from local startups, networking of AI engineers, founders, and explorers) hosted at Antler VC's Austin office — date unconfirmed (listed as upcoming on the AITX Luma calendar; prior editions ran the 4th Tuesday). Notable: venue is Antler, directly relevant to the VC/New Media hypothesis.

events.name: Startup Founders, Investors & Talent Mixer
events.venue: St Pat's Bar & Grill, 22 W 46th St
events.description: Free founder-investor-talent mixer (also listed on Eventbrite as Ascent Valley's AI & Tech Networking Event, same venue/date) — direct founder-and-investor room for the VC discovery question.

events.name: Funders & Founders Happy Hour
events.description: Casual networking happy hour for founders, investors, operators, and builders across the Bay Area startup ecosystem. Lean founder-and-investor room for the VC discovery question.

events.name: Austin AI & Machine Learning Startups, Investors, Innovators Networking Mixer
events.description: AI/ML-focused pitch mixer (7-10 PM) with live 1-minute pitches and open networking; audience is AI founders, VCs and angel investors, and ML practitioners — an AI-specific founder-and-investor night.

events.name: Austin Female Founders & Friends
events.description: Morning gathering of Austin women founders — community/partner recruiting surface, women-in-AI adjacent.

events.name: AI Growth Summit New York 2026
events.description: Evening networking summit (6-9pm) for New York's AI founders and operators at Soho House, hosted by Founderpath ahead of its September SF summit — SaaS founder/investor crowd.

events.name: AI Agent Founder Dinner
events.description: Intimate invite-only dinner for top AI agent founders in the Bay Area, hosted by the Agents and the Future community. Date listed as July 23; year not shown on page — date unconfirmed, verify before committing.

events.name: Scaling Revenue — with Vercel COO Jeanne DeWitt Grosser
events.description: Free evening fireside with Vercel COO Jeanne DeWitt Grosser (ex-Stripe GTM) on scaling revenue, hosted by Baseten's president. AI founders and business leaders — strong SaaS/GTM executive room.

events.name: Founder Dinner (Brderless)
events.description: Curated founder dinner in the West Village — small-room, high-trust founder gathering (near capacity).

events.name: VB Transform 2026
events.description: VentureBeat's flagship enterprise AI conference on agentic orchestration, AI infrastructure, and enterprise intelligence. Draws enterprise AI executives, builders, and press — strong ICP-1/2 and category-presence room.

events.name: Founder Dinner
events.description: Free curated founder dinner (venue TBA) — salon-format room of startup founders, Eve's highest-conversion format for ICP-1/2 conversations.

events.name: Junto Founder Dinner
events.description: Free invite-style founder dinner (venue TBA) — curated salon room of NYC founders, strong ICP-1/2 conversion format.

events.name: AI-Native Women: Beauty, Health, Wellness
events.description: Women-in-AI gathering focused on consumer verticals — women founders and operators; community/partner recruiting surface.

events.name: Lenny's Newsletter Meetup
events.description: Free community meetup of Lenny's Newsletter readers — product/growth operators and founders at SaaS companies; a content-flywheel-native audience. Venue TBA.

events.name: Creator Economy Mixer
events.description: Free mixer for creator-economy operators, marketers, and founders — personal-brand and content-native crowd, adjacent to Eve's executive-voice category. Venue TBA.

events.name: Creator Economy Live East 2026
events.description: East Coast influencer-marketing conference for 500+ brands (Fenty, Expedia, L'Oreal); brand marketing managers to senior directors owning creator strategy — CMO-org buyers. Some listings show Jul 28-29; site says Jul 29 — confirm exact days.

events.name: GenAI Summit SF 2026 / AGI Summit
events.venue: Palace of Fine Arts, 3301 Lyon St
events.description: Two-day flagship GenAI gathering with thousands of attendees — AI practitioners, researchers, founders, and VCs — covering AI agents and frontier breakthroughs. Big tentpole-style room with an investor track presence.

events.name: Digital Insurance Connect 2026
events.description: Invitation-only forum for 700+ senior CX, marketing, and digital transformation leaders from insurance carriers, agencies, and brokers, with keynotes and pre-matched 1:1 meetings on AI, CX, and digital strategy; a concentrated room of enterprise marketing/comms executives (ICP-1/2 signal) if access can be arranged.

events.name: Austin Tech Startups, Investors, Experts Networking & Pitch Event
events.description: Evening pitch-and-network mixer (7-10 PM) with 60-second founder pitches and open networking; room mixes tech founders, VCs and angels, operators, and AI/ML professionals — a live founder-and-investor room.

events.name: Apollo Meetup NYC: Real GTM Insights, Connections & Live AI Builds
events.description: GTM practitioners meetup — sales/marketing operators sharing GTM insights with live AI builds; ICP-dense for marketing/GTM leaders.

events.name: AI Infra Sellers Meetup #4
events.description: GTM/sales community for AI companies — sellers and GTM leaders in AI; adjacent to Eve's SaaS/GTM ICP.

events.name: The Consumer VC Wake Up! CPG Austin
events.description: Investor morning meetup (consumer/CPG VCs) — investor-adjacent room for the VC/new-media discovery question.

events.name: AI In Action: What We've Learned & Where We're Headed
events.venue: BBB serving the Heart of Texas, 1805 Rutherford Ln Ste 100
events.host_org: Austin AI Alliance x Austin Tech Council x Austin Women in Technology
events.description: Panel-style partner event with Thom Singer (Austin Tech Council), Sean Bauld (Austin AI Alliance), and Ellen Cox (AWT) reflecting on AI adoption lessons and what's next; audience is Austin tech leaders and AI-curious professionals, with a women-in-tech co-host.

events.name: McGuireWoods Emerging Manager Conference: Beyond Buyouts
events.description: Multi-strategy forum convening emerging managers (Funds I-III across VC, growth equity, private credit, real assets) with LPs, family offices, pensions, and endowments — curated GP-LP meetings plus allocator panels. Direct investor/LP/emerging-manager surface for the VC New Media hypothesis; registration closes Aug 1, 2026.

events.name: AI Enterprise Conference
events.description: Full-day enterprise AI conference ($499) at Pier Sixty; enterprise buyers and executives deploying AI — ICP-1 adjacent stage with speaking potential.

events.name: AI Summit San Francisco 2026
events.description: Large AI industry conference bringing together industry leaders, developers, and innovators at Moscone West. Date listed Jul 15-17 on aggregator listings — date unconfirmed on the official site; verify before committing.

events.name: WorkOS Presents — Dwarkesh Unplugged
events.description: Free evening with Dwarkesh Patel (The Dwarkesh Podcast) in conversation with Fei-Fei Li, plus a discussion of Patel's podcast journey. A creator-led new-media room — highly relevant signal-gathering for the VC/new-media hypothesis.

events.name: CMO Summit Boston (CMO Alliance)
events.description: Invitation-only, one-day summit for C-suite and VP-level marketing leaders at companies with 200+ employees / $50M+ revenue, themed around rebuilding the marketing function on AI. ~75 attendees, 100% senior management — a concentrated ICP-1/ICP-2 executive room.

events.name: Analyst Relations Summit (Online)
events.description: Free one-day virtual summit for product marketers and analyst relations professionals on building analyst programs, executive buy-in, and market influence — 6+ sessions, 12+ speakers, recorded on-demand. B2B SaaS comms/influence persona surface.

events.name: Build w/ AI Meetup
events.description: Free casual meetup for people building with AI; builder/founder crowd, good for community presence between larger plays.

events.name: AI Product Summit
events.description: Half-day AI product summit ($475) at BrainStation SoHo; product and GTM leaders at SaaS companies — mid-funnel ICP-1/2 audience.

events.name: F.I.E.S.T.A. ATX: Founders, Investors & ATX Newcomers — 5-Year Anniversary
events.description: Monthly third-Tuesday gathering of founders, investors, operators, and community supporters with founder pitches and resource sharing; July edition celebrates the group's 5th anniversary at Capital Factory.

events.name: Ai4 2026
events.description: America's largest AI industry conference (~12,000 attendees, 1,000 speakers) spanning enterprise AI adoption across industries, with executive and industry tracks. Dense concentration of AI builders, enterprise buyers, and investors; pre-event workshops Aug 2-3.

events.name: NYC Founders & Operators: Rooftop Drinks
events.description: Founder and operator networking mixer co-listed by Bond AI — founder-journey community room, warm-intro surface.

events.name: Scrappy AI Founders Go Karting (Seed to Series A)
events.description: Seed-to-Series-A AI founder social — founder community room, warm-lead and partner-recruiting surface.

events.name: NYC AI Nexus — Inaugural Demo Day
events.description: Free inaugural demo day for NYC AI startups (venue TBA) — founder-and-investor room, fits the VC/New Media discovery play.

events.name: NYC Coffee Club — Early-Stage AI-Native Founders & Funders
events.description: Free morning gathering of early-stage AI-native founders and the investors funding them — rare in-window August founder-and-investor room for the VC/New Media play. Venue TBA.

events.name: AI Happy Hour
events.description: Evening AI community happy hour in SF — lean networking room for AI builders and operators during a quiet stretch of August. Venue details on listing.

events.name: Austin Big Business, Tech & Entrepreneur Professional Networking Soiree
events.venue: The Dogwood Rock Rose, 11420 Rock Rose Ave #130
events.host_org: Toronto Entrepreneur and Startup Network / Austin's Entrepreneurs, Startup & Business Coalition
events.description: General business and tech networking evening (6-8:30 PM) mixing startup founders, business owners, freelancers, and professionals; broad-funnel room rather than curated — useful as a lean community-presence play in a quiet late-August stretch.

events.name: Digital Summit Minneapolis 2026
events.description: Two-day digital marketing conference for CMOs, marketing directors, content marketers, and agency teams covering AI, content marketing, social, and digital strategy; 2026 speakers include Rand Fishkin and Andy Crestodina. Mid-market marketing and agency persona surface.

events.name: PRSA Austin Connect: Brews & Bites
events.description: Informal networking happy hour for PR and communications professionals (5:30-7 PM, free); a low-cost way into Austin's comms community — an ICP-3-adjacent room of agency and in-house comms people.

events.name: AI Marketing Summit (Revenue Marketing Alliance)
events.description: Free virtual summit for a global audience of marketing decision-makers on operationalizing AI across marketing strategy, with sessions recorded for on-demand access. Date per event listing (Aug 20, 2026) — confirm on registration page.

events.name: DevRelCon 2026
events.description: Developer-relations and community-marketing conference ($650); audience owns developer content, community, and advocacy programs — adjacent buyer for content/voice tooling. May run multiple days; end date unconfirmed.

events.name: MozCon 2026
events.description: Major SEO/content-marketing conference ($849) drawing senior marketers, content leads, and agency teams; likely multi-day — end date unconfirmed, confirm on Moz site.

events.name: Media & Advertising Meetup
events.description: Free evening meetup for media, advertising, and marketing professionals — a lean room for meeting comms and brand-side buyers (ICP-2/3 signal).

events.name: Affiliate Summit East 2026
events.description: Large performance/affiliate marketing conference co-located with Creator Economy Live East; brand-side and agency marketers at scale — broad marketing room, booth-heavy format.

events.name: Generative AI Summit Los Angeles 2026
events.description: One-day engineering-focused summit with 300+ AI builders and tech executives (~60% senior management) from companies like OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and Netflix. Deliberately excludes marketers — an AI-builder ICP surface, not a marketing room.

events.name: AI Adoption Open Mic & Happy Hour
events.description: Free open-mic + happy hour on real-world AI adoption stories; operators and execs sharing how they use AI — conversational room with speaking-slot potential.

events.name: AI Pitch Blitz: $1K Cash Drop Rooftop Edition (1PB.org x Verci)
events.description: Rooftop AI pitch event — founders pitching with investors in the room; founder-and-investor surface for the VC/new-media discovery question.

events.name: Austin Claude Code Meetup (Capital Factory)
events.description: AI builder meetup at Capital Factory — Austin's startup hub; community-layer presence and partner recruiting.

events.name: Enterprise AI At Scale — Talks & AI Agent Workshops
events.description: Talks and hands-on AI agent workshops focused on deploying enterprise AI at scale. Mid-funnel room for AI-adopting operators; venue details on listing.

events.name: Ragan Employee Experience Conference 2026
events.description: Ragan's conference for communications, HR, and engagement leaders covering internal comms measurement, employer branding, crisis communications, and AI's role in the future of work. High-density room of senior comms professionals (PR/comms persona surface).

events.name: 2026 AMA Summer Academic Conference
events.description: AMA's summer conference in Denver with select virtual programming on July 20; audience skews academic (marketing faculty and researchers) rather than practitioner CMOs, so treat as a low-tier category-presence surface. Date window confirmed.

events.name: AMD Advancing AI 2026
events.description: AMD's free two-day conference connecting AI developers, customers, and partners on AI infrastructure, with technical deep dives and workshops. Builder-heavy audience — more category-presence than direct pipeline.

events.name: Building Real Software with AI: A Hands-On Workshop (Austin Forum)
events.description: Hands-on afternoon workshop (2-4 PM) led by Bryon Jacob on building software with AI assistants like Claude; draws Austin's civic-minded tech and AI practitioner crowd via the long-running Austin Forum community.

events.name: AIMUG August Showcase (Austin LangChain / AI Middleware Users Group)
events.venue: ACC Rio Grande Campus, Building 3000, 1218 West Ave
events.description: Monthly first-Wednesday evening showcase of the full agentic AI stack — working-code demos, technical deep-dives, and networking, no sales decks; date is on AIMUG's 2026 calendar but speakers/details still TBA. Audience is hands-on AI builders and technical founders.

events.name: fintech_devcon 2026
events.description: Builder-focused fintech conference for engineers and product leaders building financial products, hosted by Moov. Strong founder and fintech-operator surface with hands-on technical content rather than vendor keynotes.

events.name: eTail Boston 2026 (eTail East)
events.description: Operator-focused ecommerce and omnichannel conference drawing senior retail marketing and digital leaders, with strong AI and digital-commerce sub-themes. Marketing-executive buyer surface outside the usual tech-hub cities.

events.name: Leaders In Product — Fintech Insights
events.description: Evening panel ($45) on fintech product leadership at BrainStation; fintech operators and product execs. Listed on Gary's Guide Jul 29 — direct event URL unconfirmed, verify via garysguide.com/events.

events.name: Austin Startup Meetup
events.venue: Capital Factory (1st Floor, Voltron), 701 Brazos St
events.host_org: Austin Startup Meetup (sponsored by STATION Austin)
events.description: Free monthly meetup (6-9 PM) with ATX ecosystem updates, lightning pitches, and networking; core room of Austin founders, operators, and startup enthusiasts at Capital Factory.

events.name: Pioneering Minds AI: Pitching Masterclass II
events.description: Founder pitching masterclass with investors (SeedLegals) — founder-investor room, early-stage audience.

events.name: AI that works: Apify + TwelveLabs (at Antler VC)
events.description: Applied-AI evening hosted at Antler's Austin office — founder-investor room at a firm already running a platform/new-media motion; direct surface for the VC/new-media discovery question.

events.name: Antler's Summer Bash and Hot Ones Challenge with Rho
events.description: Antler's founder-and-investor summer social — the exact firm named in the VC/new-media hypothesis, in a relaxed high-trust format.

events.name: Fed Supernova 2026
events.description: Three-day dual-use/defense innovation tentpole convening the founders, investors, and government buyers building and funding frontier tech; heavy startup-pitch and investor presence makes it a large-scale founder-and-investor room, though defense-flavored.

events.name: NYC Creative AI Forum
events.description: Free evening forum on creative applications of AI at ZeroSpace in Brooklyn; draws AI builders, creative technologists, and brand/content people — good generative-AI community room.

events.name: AI Engineers — Devs & Drinks
events.description: Free AI engineers happy hour — builder community room, useful for August community presence and partner scouting.

events.name: Aperitivo @ Marriott Marquis: Winning in AI Search, Amazon Edition
events.description: Marketing-leader aperitivo on winning in AI search — brand/content/SEO leaders navigating AI-era discovery.

events.name: Ditch the Deck — AI Show, not Tell
events.description: Live-demo format event where AI builders show working products instead of pitch decks. Demo-day-style founder room; venue details on listing.

events.name: SF Coffee Club — Early Stage B2B Tech Founders & Funders
events.description: Application-only morning coffee gathering by Forum Ventures for pre-Series A B2B/AI founders and funders, with emphasis on underrepresented founders. Curated LP/emerging-ecosystem room; venue announced on approval.

events.name: Show & Tell — AI For GTM
events.description: Free demo night of real AI-for-GTM workflows for GTM engineers, RevOps builders, SDR/AE operators, and marketing technologists. Direct line to marketing/GTM practitioners adopting AI — ICP-2/3 adjacent.

events.name: The AI Briefing by Startup Grind — The C-Suite Gap in AI Readiness
events.description: Executive briefing on the C-suite gap in AI readiness — leadership/exec audience thinking about AI adoption and voice.

events.name: AI Agents in Real-World Business Execution + Demo Day
events.description: Demo day on AI agents in business execution — builder/founder audience with demo-day format.

events.name: ASAE Annual Meeting & Exposition 2026
events.description: The flagship gathering of association executives — leaders who run member communications, content programs, and events for professional communities. Persona surface for communications/marketing leaders and a channel into many vertical communities at once.

events.name: CFO AI Leverage Report
events.description: Free session presenting an AI-leverage playbook for CFOs and finance leaders — executive audience adopting AI; listed on Gary's Guide Aug 2, direct event URL unconfirmed.
